offence_date.source: In the afternoon on 30 January 2023, the defendant was stopped by police officers in Yau Ma Tei.

place_of_offence.source: In the afternoon on 30 January 2023, the defendant was stopped by police officers in Yau Ma Tei. He was holding a car key at the time. Inside the car in question, police officers found a rucksack which contained 43.13 grammes of methamphetamine hydrochloride and various resealable plastic bags.

trafficking_mode.source: There is nothing in this case to indicate the defendant’s role beyond a mere courier.

roles_facts.source: There is nothing in this case to indicate the defendant’s role beyond a mere courier.
